summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Reading and Speaking stations for English language learning gamification platform. All features tested and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Reading station reading.html is 1100+ lines - consider splitting into separate JS module for maintainability
Speaking station speaking.html is 1200+ lines - consider splitting into separate JS module for maintainability
Both stations have good data-testid attributes for testing
test_credentials: N/A - no authentication required. Enter any name to start.
seed_data_creation: N/A - all data is embedded in HTML files
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a pure HTML/CSS/JS static site served via python3 http.server on port 8080. No backend APIs. All data is embedded in the HTML files. Access reading station at http://localhost:8080/stations/reading.html and speaking at http://localhost:8080/stations/speaking.html.

reading_station.login_screen: PASS - Login screen works, entering name and clicking START READING shows main screen
reading_station.texts_count: PASS - 24 texts available (8 units x 3 difficulty levels: easy, medium, hard)
reading_station.manga_illustrations: PASS - All 24 unique manga illustrations load from static.prod-images.emergentagent.com CDN
reading_station.comprehension_mode: PASS - Shows 5 multiple-choice questions per text
reading_station.true_false_mode: PASS - Shows 4 T/F questions per text with True/False buttons
reading_station.vocabulary_mode: PASS - Tab is present and clickable, shows 5 key vocabulary words
reading_station.score_tracking: PASS - Score, Streak, and Texts counter update on correct answers
reading_station.pit_score_js: PASS - pit-score.js is loaded (PIT_SCORE object available)
reading_station.unit_filter: PASS - Dropdown works with 8 units + All Units option

speaking_station.login_screen: PASS - Login screen works, entering name shows main screen
speaking_station.role_play_mode: PASS - Chat bubbles appear for A and B lines, typing correct A line triggers bot B response
speaking_station.fill_the_gap_mode: PASS - Shows sentence with blank and 4 word options
speaking_station.word_order_mode: PASS - Shows scrambled words to arrange with Check Answer and Clear buttons
speaking_station.unit_filter: PASS - Dropdown works with 8 units + All Units option
speaking_station.grammar_focus: PASS - Grammar Focus panel shows relevant grammar tip per dialogue
speaking_station.key_phrases: PASS - Key Phrases panel shows relevant phrases
speaking_station.pit_score_js: PASS - pit-score.js is loaded (PIT_SCORE object available)
speaking_station.mic_send_buttons: PASS - MIC button and SEND button are present in Role Play mode
speaking_station.dialogues_count: PASS - 16 dialogues across 8 units (2 per unit)
